title: Visual Indicator for Unread Updates

posts.author: Manaswini (Manaswini Gaddam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, all updates in a Monday.com board appear in the same color regardless of whether they are new or already read. This makes it difficult to quickly identify newly added updates, especially on items with frequent activity. There is no visual distinction between unread and read updates, so users must manually check timestamps or scan through the content to find new information.

What are you trying to achieve

Clearly distinguish unread updates from read updates using a visual indicator (such as a different color, highlight, or badge)
Allow users to quickly identify newly added updates at a glance
Improve visibility of important communication on active boards
